title: Case 001: The Missing Engineer
description: Engineer Artem Volkov entered Sector C during a station-wide power anomaly. Official records say he never left.

characters.name: Artem Volkov
characters.description: Responsible for diagnostics of Sector C power systems.
knownFacts: His badge was last recorded at the entrance to Sector C.
He requested a manual inspection of the maintenance airlock one day before the incident.
His suit transmitter stopped responding at 08:17.

characters.name: Daniil Orlov
characters.description: Had access to power routing, door logging, and local maintenance overrides.
knownFacts: His access record contains a two-minute gap during the incident.
He filed a report blaming a corrupted camera buffer before the security team requested one.

characters.name: Mira Sokolova
characters.description: Monitored restricted-sector access during the station anomaly.
knownFacts: Reported the Sector C door conflict after the incident.
Was recorded in the central corridor at 08:13.

characters.name: KORA
characters.description: Damaged station intelligence responsible for reconstructing memory fragments.
knownFacts: Memory sectors around 08:15 are partially corrupted.
Still retained low-level maintenance telemetry after the main log service restarted.

rooms.name: Central Corridor
rooms.description: Main connection route between crew and technical sectors.

rooms.name: Sector C
rooms.description: Restricted technical sector with unstable power telemetry.

rooms.name: Maintenance Airlock
rooms.description: Manual service airlock connected to Sector C.

rooms.name: Power Junction C-4
rooms.description: Local routing node for Sector C and the maintenance airlock.

rooms.name: Security Post
rooms.description: Monitoring station for restricted doors and badge events.

events.title: Maintenance override armed
events.description: A local override token is armed at Power Junction C-4 using Orlov's maintenance credentials.

events.title: Volkov badge accepted
events.description: Door log reports Artem Volkov entering Sector C. No exit event is found.

events.title: Camera sees Volkov in corridor
events.description: A damaged camera frame appears to show Volkov outside Sector C one minute after his logged entry.

events.title: Power spike detected
events.description: Power routing briefly overloads near the maintenance airlock.

events.title: Emergency audio fragment
events.description: Volkov reports that the airlock is sealed from the service side before the channel cuts out.

events.title: Door logging restarted
events.description: The door logging service restarts after a 96-second outage.

events.title: Suit transmitter lost
events.description: Volkov's suit transmitter fails after a pressure drop inside the maintenance airlock.

evidence.title: Sector C door log
evidence.content: 08:12 - Badge accepted: Artem Volkov. Entry recorded. No exit event found. 08:16 - Door logging service restored after watchdog restart. The missing interval overlaps with the power anomaly.

evidence.title: Damaged corridor camera
evidence.content: Frame C-13 shows a figure tagged as Artem Volkov in the central corridor at 08:13. The biometric confidence is 41%. Security officer Mira Sokolova is visible in the same corridor feed, but her position does not match the tagged figure. The camera timestamp has a checksum warning.

evidence.title: Power routing anomaly
evidence.content: 08:14 - Localized spike near maintenance airlock. 08:14:22 - Power Junction C-4 routes auxiliary load to manual airlock seals. 08:16 - Door logging service restarted. The energy pattern matches manual seal engagement, not an accidental sector failure.

evidence.title: Maintenance override token
evidence.content: 08:11 - Local override token armed at Power Junction C-4. Credential hash resolves to Daniil Orlov. 08:14 - Token used to lock maintenance airlock manual controls. 08:16 - Token revoked after log service restart.

evidence.title: Emergency channel fragment
evidence.content: 08:15:03 - Volkov: 'The inner seal just locked. I did not authorize this.' 08:15:09 - Unknown voice, low volume: 'You should have left the routing alone.' 08:15:12 - Volkov: 'Orlov, open the service panel.' Signal cuts out after a pressure alarm.

evidence.title: Suit telemetry and medical report
evidence.content: Volkov's suit recorded rapid pressure loss between 08:16:44 and 08:17:10. Injury pattern is consistent with airlock decompression, not electrical trauma. Final transmitter ping originated from the maintenance airlock, not Sector C main floor.

evidence.title: Security officer note
evidence.content: Mira Sokolova reported the door/camera conflict at 08:24. Her note says the corridor camera was already throwing checksum warnings before she reviewed it. She recommends checking low-level maintenance telemetry instead of the camera tag.

evidence.title: KORA memory fragment
evidence.content: Recovered memory fragment: 'Primary door log offline for 96 seconds. Low-level maintenance bus intact. Manual seal command originated from Power Junction C-4. Operator identity: D. Orlov. Confidence: 87%.'

solution.method: Manual airlock lockout and logging interruption
